info.title: SPA Management API
info.description: API documentation for the SPA Management system, including authentication, appointments, and services management.

get.description: Retrieve summary stats including counts of active users, total and categorized appointments (Pending, Approved, Rejected), services, and categories.
Retrieve all registered users. Optional filters for `role` and `isActive` can be specified. Returns users sorted by registration date (newest first).
Fetch detailed profile information of a specific user along with their complete appointment booking history.

200.description: User profile and bookings fetched successfully

delete.description: Remove a user account from the system.

put.description: Update the role of a user to either "user" or "admin". Admins are prevented from changing their own role.

400.description: Validation error (e.g. invalid role specified, attempting to update own role)

put.description: Activate or deactivate a user account.

post.description: Book a new spa appointment. All fields (fullName, address, state, country, mobileNumber, categoryId, serviceId, serviceType, appointmentDate) are required.

201.description: Appointment booked successfully, pending admin approval

message.example: Appointment booked successfully. Pending admin approval.

get.description: Retrieve all appointments booked by the currently authenticated user, sorted by the booking creation date (newest first). Supports filtering by status.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional status filter to only show appointments matching this state.

delete.summary: Delete all appointments for the current user
delete.description: Permanently clear all appointment records booked by the currently authenticated user.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific appointment belonging to the logged-in user. Fully populates the associated category, service, and user data.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The MongoDB ObjectId of the appointment.

put.description: Update the editable fields of a user's appointment. This is only allowed if the appointment is currently in 'Pending' status.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The MongoDB ObjectId of the appointment.

notes.example: Please adjust time slightly if there is a conflict.
Please adjust time slightly if there is a conflict.

400.description: Bad request (e.g. appointment is not in Pending status)

message.example: Cannot edit appointment with status 'Approved'. Only Pending appointments can be edited.

delete.description: Permanently remove a specific appointment record belonging to the logged-in user.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The MongoDB ObjectId of the appointment.

put.summary: Cancel a pending or requested appointment
put.description: Cancel an appointment belonging to the user. This is only allowed if the appointment has not yet been approved (i.e. status is Pending). Once cancelled, a notification is sent to the user.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The MongoDB ObjectId of the appointment.

400.description: Bad request (e.g. appointment already approved or cancelled)

message.example: Cannot cancel an already approved appointment

get.description: Retrieve a list of all appointments booked in the entire system, sorted by newest first. Admins can optionally filter the results by status.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional status to filter appointments by.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific appointment in the system by its ID. Includes full details on the booking user, including their geo-location.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The MongoDB ObjectId of the appointment.

put.description: Update the status of a specific appointment. Must be Approved, Rejected, or Pending. Modifying the status triggers appropriate in-app notifications to the booking user.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The MongoDB ObjectId of the appointment.

400.description: Bad request (Invalid status or invalid ObjectId).

message.example: Status must be Approved, Rejected, or Pending

post.description: Register a new user account with details and an optional facial verification image upload. Role is default "user" and cannot be modified from the request payload.

email.description: Unique email address of the user

faceScreenshot.description: Portrait image file upload for facial registration

message.example: User with this email or mobile number already exists

post.description: Login using email/mobileNumber/identifier combined with a password. Updates user geolocation in the system if coordinates are supplied.

identifier.description: Alternative field accepting either email or mobile number

message.example: Email or mobile number is required
Your account has been deactivated. Contact support.

get.description: Retrieve the top 10 newest active services to populate the landing page carousel/slider.

post.description: Create a new service category. Category name must be unique.

description.description: Brief description of what services are in this category

message.example: Category with this name already exists

put.description: Update details of an existing category by its unique ID.

delete.description: Permanently remove a service category from the system by ID.

get.description: Retrieve categories list. Supports page/limit pagination and optional classification type filtering. Automatically populates basic associated services info.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Optional category classification type to filter by

post.description: Create a new spa service with an image upload. finalPrice is auto-computed based on price and discount percentage.

description.example: A relaxing full body massage using traditional Swedish techniques.

categoryId.description: The Mongoose ObjectId of the associated category

description.example: A relaxing full body massage using traditional Swedish techniques.

put.description: Update details of an existing service by ID. Uploading a new image will automatically clean up the old one from Cloudinary.

delete.description: Permanently remove a service from the system and delete its photo asset from Cloudinary storage.

get.description: Retrieve all active (isActive=true) spa services. Supports optional category ID and case-insensitive service type filtering.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Optional Category ID to filter services

get.description: Retrieve detailed specifications of an active spa service by its ID, populating its category information.
Retrieve all notifications for the authenticated user, sorted by creation date (newest first), along with the total count of unread notifications.

message.example: Your appointment has been booked successfully.

put.description: Mark all unread notifications belonging to the authenticated user as read.

put.summary: Mark a specific notification as read
put.description: Mark a single notification as read by its unique notification ID.

delete.description: Delete all notifications belonging to the authenticated user.
Delete a single notification by its unique notification ID.

get.description: Retrieve the currently logged in user's profile information (excludes password).

put.description: Update the authenticated user's profile information. Supports uploading a new profile picture.

profileImage.description: Image file to upload as profile avatar

put.description: Update password for the authenticated user session. Validates old password and requires new password confirmation.

400.description: Validation error (e.g. password mismatch, invalid length, incorrect old password)

message.example: New password and confirm password do not match

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Administrative dashboard, user listings, and permission controls (Requires Admin Role)

tags.name: Appointments
tags.description: Appointment booking and management for users and admin administrators

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: User notification history and read status management

tags.name: Profile
tags.description: Authenticated user profile and password management
